latin: Puer claudus, cum alii pueri eum persequerentur, cursu effugere coepit. amica eius clamavit: 'curre, Forreste, curre!' et subito crura eius instrumenta ferrea fregerunt et velocissime cucurrit.

questions.prompt: What happened to the boy's leg braces?
questions.target: They broke off as he ran
choices: He took them off before running
They broke off as he ran

translation: A lame boy, when other boys were chasing him, began to escape by running. His friend shouted: 'Run, Forrest, run!' And suddenly his legs broke the iron braces and he ran very fast.
